summary: Iteration 58 — multi-part bundle (PARTs 1-5 + Task 1). Backend: 14/14 pytest cases PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_iter58_naslech_collisions.py covering (a) GET /api/team exposing 4 new lecturer-profile fields (preferred_age_groups, supported_program_ids, learning_program_ids, admin_note); (b) PATCH /api/team/{id}/lecturer-profile — lecturer can patch own preferred_age_groups; admin_note silently dropped for lecturer; admin-only admin_note accepted and persisted (verified via GET round-trip); lecturer PATCHing another user returns 403; (c) Observer (náslech) full CRUD — admin POST → status='approved', lecturer POST self → status='pending', admin PATCH /approve flips to 'approved', lecturer→approve returns 403, DELETE by admin works; (d) GET /api/bookings/me/naslech-upcoming returns a list for the lecturer; (e) Observer row does not poison the lecturer pool (adding lecturer as náslech does not remove them from GET /team); (f) PART 4 — POST /api/bookings with an overlapping slot returns 409 with structured detail={blocked:true, code, source, message_cs, details:{raw}}; message_cs contains no 'allow_parallel' technical term. Frontend: Playwright click-flow on https://school-crm-saas.preview.emergentagent.com verified (1) Task 1 — /admin/programs → 3-dot kebab on program card exposes menu item testid=pdf-report-{id} with label 'Stáhnout PDF report'; clicking triggers a 50 KB %PDF download (archive_report_Barvy_kolem_nás_MŠ.pdf). (2) PART 5 — ProgramCollisionTab card title is 'Současně s jinými programy'; helper text on toggle switches correctly between 'Další programy se mohou v tomto čase konat, s dále uvedenými omezeními.' (ON) and 'V době konání nemohou probíhat jiné programy.' (OFF); Shrnutí section uses the same terminology; no 'paralelní provoz' literal anywhere on the page.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: routes/bookings.py wraps collision_error via classify_collision() in both admin (line 129) and public (line 215) branches — structured HTTPException.detail is consistent across both entry points.

VERIFIED: services/collision_classifier.py _MAPPING is exhaustive (room, lecturer, separate_only, full_block, exception, no_lecturer); fallback 'UNKNOWN'/'Slot je obsazen.' is safe. Pure function — no DB I/O.

VERIFIED: routes/observers.py — duplicate-prevention via 409 on (reservation_id, lecturer_id); approve-only-admin and delete-admin-or-self RBAC are enforced; institution_id scoping applied on every query. Observer rows are stored in a separate table so they do NOT feed into collision/lecturer-pool queries (confirmed via non-blocking test).
VERIFIED: routes/team.py PATCH /{id}/lecturer-profile has correct RBAC (self-or-admin) and whitelists admin_note to admin only; returns 400 when payload yields no allowed fields.

MINOR (observed): routes/observers.py list_observers does not filter by status — both pending and approved are returned to the caller. If the UI wants to show only approved by default, the frontend filters; backend behaviour is correct per spec.

MINOR (observed): routes/observers.py add_observer silently accepts payload without validating booking date is in the future — not required by spec but worth noting; existing me/naslech-upcoming already filters by date.
Frontend BookingPage.js line 285 correctly renders structured message_cs and gracefully falls back to string detail or a generic Czech message.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Task 1 PDF download + PART 5 wording both verified)

test_credentials: Used galerie@budezivo.cz / Galerie2026! (gallery admin) and anna.dvorakova@budezivo.cz / Lektor2026! (lecturer). No new data seeded.
seed_data_creation: None. All observer rows created during the test are cleaned up in the same run (test_delete_observer).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run with `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_iter58_naslech_collisions.py -v`. Collision test uses a pre-existing booking in Galerie U Zlatého kohouta (institution eefb9cbf-…) and reuses its program_id+date+time_block+lecturer — this reliably triggers a 409 with the structured payload. Bookings schema uses num_students/num_teachers/group_type/age_or_class (NOT students_count/teachers_count/age_group); gdpr_consent+terms_accepted must be True for admin POST too. Observer row cleanup is automatic but if the last test aborts early, stale rows may persist — safe to delete via DELETE /api/bookings/{bid}/naslech/{obs_id}.
rca of the issue: N/A — all acceptance criteria met. One transient test skip on first run was caused by the test payload using the old schema field names; corrected to num_students/num_teachers/group_type/age_or_class/gdpr_consent/terms_accepted and the collision test now passes deterministically.
